holdings.infoBox: JHSC is an equity ETF with a total of 493 individual holdings. The top holdings are Arrow Electronics stock at 0.64%, Littelfuse at 0.62%, Element Solutions at 0.57%, Ryder System at 0.55%, and Sanmina at 0.54%.

overview.description: The John Hancock Multifactor Small Cap ETF (JHSC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the John Hancock Dimensional Small Cap index. The fund tracks an index of US small-cap stocks selected by relative price and profitability. Securities are weighted by multiple factors relative to their sector peers. JHSC was launched on Nov 8, 2017 and is issued by John Hancock.
infoTable: John Hancock Dimensional Small Cap Index
